blockers.detail: The fine-grained GitHub PAT (github_pat_11ARYW7JQ...) has READ-ONLY permissions for repository content. It can read metadata (admin/push/pull flags) but cannot create blobs, commit files, push, or create gists. Production server's GitHub token also returns 401 for write operations. A GitHub token with 'Contents: Read and write' scope on ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest is required.
blockers.fix: Provide a GitHub token (classic ghp_ token with 'repo' scope, or fine-grained github_pat_ token with 'Contents: Read and write' permission) for ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest. Once available, the 16 route handlers will be pushed and Render will auto-deploy within 3-5 minutes.

final_status: BLOCKED — GitHub token is read-only for content operations. All 16 routes are built, registered, and passing build checks. Only GitHub push permission is missing to complete deployment.
